overview.description: The First Trust Managed Futures Strategy Fund (FMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund seeks positive returns uncorrelated with major asset classes. The actively managed fund uses futures in commodity (50%), currency (25%) and equity (25%) indexes. FMF was launched on Aug 1, 2013 and is issued by First Trust.
